name_en: M83616 Blue Denim! This Pochette Cosmétique makeup bag is cut into a trendy, relaxed silhouette. Fashionable faded denim tones are applied to certified cotton canvas, paired with calfskin trim and dazzling rivets. Ample space to hold cosmetics and small personal items, making it a perfect travel companion.
name_cn:
M83616 Blue Denim! This Pochette Cosmétique makeup bag is cut into a trendy, relaxed silhouette. Fashionable faded denim tones are applied to certified cotton canvas, paired with calfskin trim and dazzling rivets. Ample space to hold cosmetics and small personal items, making it a perfect travel companion.
Size: 19 x 12 x 6 cm (Length x Height x Width).
